title: 绘画艺术风格图
description: A watercolor illustration of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a {argument name="character appearance" default="cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes"}. She is {arg
prompt_raw: A watercolor illustration of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a {argument name="character appearance" default="cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes"}. She is {argument name="action" default="smiling happily while holding up her middle finger"} with a white-furred hand. She wears a green garment with a fluffy white collar. The background features soft, painted green foliage and small yellow flowers on textured paper. At the top, large hand-drawn green Japanese text reads "{argument name="main title" default="なかゆびさん"}". Below it, brown Japanese text reads "{argument name="subtitle" default="こんにちは"}". On the middle-left, smaller black text reads "{argument name="author text" default="さく・え：とらの"}". The image has a visible book spine on the left edge, emphasizing the physical book format.
prompt_preview: A watercolor illustration of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a {argument name="character appearance" default="cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes"}. She is {arg
prompt_display_cn:
案例「character appearance」属于UI/界面设计。这是一张 UI/界面设计类案例，重点在界面组件、信息层级、按钮、卡片、导航、状态栏和交互元素的完整呈现。适合改成游戏 UI、App 界面、网页控制台、直播界面、品牌产品界面或 UI Kit。

原始提示词要点：这条案例原文以英文描述画面，需要转成中文展示版。它的主要内容包括：A 水彩 插画 of a children's picture book cover. The main subject is a 【角色 appearance：cute furry kemonomimi girl with short green hair, cat ears, and green eyes】. She is 【action：smiling happily while holding up her middle finger】 with a white-furred hand. She wears a green garment with a fluffy white collar. The 背景 features soft, painted green foliage and small yellow flowers on textured paper. At the top, large 手绘 green 日文文字 reads "【main 标题：なかゆびさん】". Below it, brown 日文文字 reads "【sub标题：こんにちは】". On the middle-left, smaller black text reads "【author text：さく・え：とらの】". The image has a visible book spine on the left edge, emphasizing the physical book format.
prompt_template_cn:
设计一张【产品/应用名称】的【界面类型】UI 画面。

界面主题：
这是一个面向【目标用户】的【应用场景】界面，核心功能是【核心功能】。

整体风格：
采用【视觉风格】，主色调为【主色调】，材质/质感为【材质效果】，整体保持专业、清晰、统一。

界面结构：
画面包含【顶部区域】、【主内容区域】、【侧边栏/导航区】、【底部工具栏】等部分。各区域之间层级清楚，留白合理。

组件内容：
加入【按钮】、【卡片】、【图标】、【输入框】、【状态标签】、【数据/文字信息】等 UI 元素。关键文字包括：【界面文字】。

展示要求：
像真实可上线产品界面或高质量 UI Kit，不要像随意拼贴。文字清晰，图标统一，边距、圆角、阴影和对齐关系精致。

输出比例：
画面比例为【画面比例】。
